svg.text: Direct Polaris Lending, BNPL, Repayment and Reconciliation Architecture
No LOS. Local app owns workflow, locks, scoring, reservations, audit, idempotency, and reconciliation. Polaris owns CIF, CASA, line, child loans, journals, schedules, payments, and statements.
store passive and settlement account acntCode
1. Customer registration, DAN, CIF, deposit account and KYC sync
view onboarding state and retryable errors
DAN verification, HUR fetch, CIF create/update
Polaris timeout sets pending_reconcile, not failed
search by register/national ID before retry
KYC active only after local + Polaris sync
2. Scoring, limit creation and Polaris line account
create line account after active loan limit
line cannot be lower than confirmed utilization
line uses custCode + deposit acntCode + product config
no offer if score sync required but unresolved
suspend new drawdowns if over utilized
3. One-tap and BNPL loan application, reservation, child loan, schedule, link and grant
lock line row, reserve amount before approval
link child loan to line, then grant non-cash
BNPL: grant to deposit, then transfer deposit to merchant passive
no customer/POS approval before merchant transfer succeeds
grant only after schedule and line link are confirmed
all writes via outbox and operation attempts
timeout means pending_reconcile, query before retry
prevents double grant and double POS approval
4. Repayment, allocation, closing, merchant settlement and refunds
QPay callback uniqueness and signature validation
inbound money to customer deposit, then pay loan
final payment checks close detail before account close
ledger journals hold inbound, payment, close, settlement facts
no loan payment until inbound money confirmed
one reversal per original Polaris jrno
5. Reconciliation, audit, reporting and EOD/service-pause guard
match local ledger vs Polaris journals/statements
balances, loan state, schedules, settlement totals
ambiguous matches stop in manual review
loan/account detail APIs before retry or close
matching jrno updates local success; no match may retry same key
Critical invariant: every Polaris write call is outboxed, idempotent, audited at business-status level, journaled if financial, and reconciled if timeout/interruption occurs.
Status language: failed = confirmed failure; pending_reconcile = unknown result; dead_letter = unresolved after automated reconciliation.
